_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain operational documentation for data systems, including standard operating procedures, runbooks, escalation matrices, and knowledge base articles.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-023 (AI, cosine: 0.517), AI-K-025 (AI, cosine: 0.495).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.502). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, operational]. DCWF-only terms [basic, infrastructure] vs WIDAI-only terms [articles, base, data, develop, documentation, escalation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.875 (P=0.907, R=0.845). P exceeds R by 0.061 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Knowledge of basic operational infrastructure." and "Develop and maintain operational documentation for data systems, including stand" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.544 ≈ STS 0.502 (gap 0.042). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge, operational] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.5%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, operational]. DCWF-only: [basic, infrastructure]. WIDAI-only: [articles, base, data, develop, documentation, escalation].
